headline: S&P Global’s Services PMI Shows First Contraction in More Than Three Years
summary: S&P Global’s purchasing managers index for services providers fell to 49.8 points in March from 51.7 in February as a rise in energy prices brought on by the war in the Middle East eroded confidence.

headline: Is It Time To Reassess S&P Global (SPGI) After Recent Share Price Weakness?
summary: If you are wondering whether S&P Global's current share price offers good value, it helps to look past the headline moves and focus on what the fundamentals might justify. The stock last closed at US$431.16, with returns of 4.5% over 7 days, a 2.9% decline over 30 days, a 15.9% decline year to date, and an 11.2% decline over 1 year, set against a 29.6% gain over 3 years and 22.9% over 5 years. Recent coverage around S&P Global has focused on its role as a key data and analytics provider...
